meta.title: Log in

meta.title: Launch Plan | QuickIn
meta.description: Step-by-step readiness plan for shipping QuickIn across Web, iOS and Android.

header.title: Launch Plan
header.subtitle: Ship QuickIn across Web · iOS · Android — four parallel tracks.

legend.note: · no Supabase · local PostgreSQL → Vercel/Neon for production

backend.title: Backend
backend.migrated: Migrated data layer psql CLI → pg driver (Vercel/Neon‑ready, parameterized).
backend.verified: Verified listings · search · login · booking insert · reservations.
backend.initSql: init.sql (prod schema + seed) · build flags · next build passes.

web.title: Web
web.errorPages: Error & 404 pages, error banner, mobile‑responsive grids.

android.title: Android
android.keystore: Release keystore + signed APK; both builds pass.

phase0.heading: 🔑 Phase 0 — keys & accounts (you create these; unblock everything)
phase0.note: ~45 min total. Full how‑to in SETUP.md / OAUTH‑SETUP.md / DEPLOY‑VERCEL.md.
phase0.mapsKey: Google Maps API key (Maps JS · Android SDK · iOS SDK).
phase0.oauthClients: Google OAuth client IDs — Web, iOS, Android (+ SHA‑1).
phase0.appleDeveloper: Apple Developer ($99/yr) → App ID + Sign in with Apple + Team.

backend.title: A · Backend / Infra
backend.hardenEnv: Harden env: strong AUTH_SECRET, secrets in env only.
backend.provisionDb: Provision prod Postgres; run init.sql; import real data.
backend.deploy: Deploy to Vercel; set DATABASE_URL + keys as env.
backend.apiBaseUrl: Decide the public API base URL for the apps.
backend.later: Later: payments (Stripe), image upload/host, backups, monitoring.

web.title: B · Web
web.flipMap: Flip map to Google Maps (paste Maps key).
web.googleLogin: Turn on Google login (+ Apple via Services ID + HTTPS).
web.realListings: Real listings via admin + listing photo upload.
web.a11y: A11y pass; deploy to the domain.

ios.title: C · iOS
ios.apiBaseUrl: Point release apiBaseURL at the Vercel URL.
ios.signing: Xcode signing: set Team + add Sign in with Apple.
ios.maps: (If Google Maps) add Maps iOS SDK + key; add Google iOS client id.

android.title: D · Android
android.apiBaseUrl: Point release API_BASE_URL at the Vercel URL.
android.clientId: Add Google client id + register debug & release SHA‑1.
android.releaseAab: Build signed release AAB; test on a real device.

doNow.title: 🚀 Do now, in parallel (no keys)
doNow.backend: Backend: deploy‑ready (done) → push to GitHub + import to Vercel.
doNow.web: Web: real data via admin, photo upload, a11y.
doNow.android: Android: set prod URL, signed release AAB, device test.

ready.title: 🏁 Definition of ready to ship
ready.web: Web live on the domain (HTTPS), real data, Maps + Google/Apple login.
ready.ios: iOS on TestFlight (signed, real login + maps), passing on a device.
ready.android: Android signed release on Play internal testing, passing on a device.
ready.db: Production DB with backups; apps pointed at the prod API.

footer.source: Source of truth: LAUNCH-PLAN.md · deploy steps: DEPLOY-VERCEL.md · keys: SETUP.md.
